log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aasimar — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:2+3=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Ogre --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Aasimar — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:19+6=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 7 damage. Aasimar — Unarmored Caster HP: 60/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
